title: Floe Configuration
description: Provider configuration for floe worker sessions. Lives at .floe/config.json. Committed to git (no secrets — API keys stay in environment variables).

defaultProvider.description: Default provider for all worker sessions unless overridden per role

enabledProviders.description: Providers enabled for this repo. New repos must set this explicitly. If absent on an existing config, pre-flight will flag it as unconfigured.

configured.description: Whether interactive configuration has been completed. Set to true after the configure command runs. Existing configs without this field are treated as configured.

roles.description: Per-role provider overrides. Omit a role to use defaultProvider.

provider.description: Provider for this role. Omit to use defaultProvider.

model.description: Model identifier passed to the provider adapter. Provider-specific (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', 'o3-mini'). Omit to use provider default.

thinking.description: Thinking/reasoning level. Adapter maps to provider-specific settings. Omit for provider default.
